'''Sneaky''' was [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo's]] [[R9-series astromech droid|R9 unit]] assigned to her new [[StealthX]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] at the time of the [[Swarm War]]. Sneaky was destroyed when [[Jagged Fel]] shot down Jaina during the [[Battle of Tenupe]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> He was later replaced by Jaina's new [[R9]] unit, [[Sneaker]].

Apparently, there was a second droid named '''Sneaky''' that was used by Jaina during the [[Battle of Uroro Station]]. This droid was assumed destroyed when Jaina's StealthX suffered a barrage of turbo lasers from the [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']].

{{Droid-stub}}
